description_long: This is a square pedestal table with a blue tabletop and a sturdy, octagonal base, commonly found in diners or casual eateries. The tabletop is adorned with typical restaurant items: a red and yellow squeeze bottle (likely ketchup and mustard), a pair of salt and pepper shakers, a rectangular napkin dispenser, and a pair of upright, red-covered menus. The table's base is a single, central black column that flares out into a wide, stable foot. The tabletop has a slightly raised edge, helping to prevent items from sliding off. The overall design is utilitarian, with no decorative embellishments, focusing on function and ease of cleaning. The items on the table suggest it is ready for customer use in a public dining setting.
description: A square blue-topped pedestal table with condiment bottles, shakers, a napkin dispenser, and menus, typical of a diner or casual eatery.
description_view_0: Front view showing all tabletop items clearly: ketchup and mustard bottles, napkin dispenser, menus, and salt and pepper shakers.
description_view_1: Side view with menus most prominent, partially obscuring the napkin dispenser and condiments.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backs of the menus and napkin dispenser, with condiment bottles visible to the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with ketchup and mustard bottles in the foreground, menus and napkin dispenser behind.
